schoolDescription: TTC Rubengera - A Teacher Training College dedicated to excellence in education. Join us to shape the future of teaching.
shortAbout: TTC Rubengera is more than just a college; it is a community dedicated to nurturing future educators. From our humble beginnings to becoming a beacon of teacher training in the Western Province.
fullHistory: Founded in 1998, TTC Rubengera has grown from a small teaching center to one of the most respected teacher training colleges in Rwanda. Our mission is to produce competent, compassionate, and innovative educators who will transform the lives of students across the nation.
programsSubtitle: Comprehensive teacher training for future educators
smeDesc: Training teachers in advanced science and mathematics pedagogy for secondary schools.
srsDesc: Preparing educators to teach history, geography, and religious education.
leDesc: Specializing in teaching English, French, and local languages.
eclpDesc: Training teachers for nursery and early childhood development programs.
eLearningDesc: Digital literacy and online teaching methodology courses.
englishProficiencyDesc: Intensive English language courses for teachers.
neverAgainClubDesc: Promoting peace, unity, and reconciliation through education.
roboticsClubDesc: Innovation and technology club for young minds.
englishClubDesc: Practice and improve English language skills.
announcement1: Breaking: TTC Rubengera wins Regional Science Fair 2023
announcement3: Notice: New Bus Route 4 now available
examScheduleDesc: The final examination timetable for Term 1 has been released. Please check the student portal for specific dates and room allocations.
sportsDayDesc: Join us for a day of athletic prowess and house spirit! Events start at 8:00 AM on the main field. Parents are welcome.
libraryNoticeDesc: The main library will be closed for renovations from Oct 20th to Nov 5th. A temporary reading room is set up in Block C.
cleanupDriveDesc: Students and staff are invited to participate in the Rubavu district clean-up initiative this Saturday.
signInToContinue: Sign in to continue to your dashboard
loginHelpText: Sign in with the same account you registered. You will be sent to your dashboard automatically based on your saved role.
applicationSuccessMessage: Your application has been successfully submitted. We will contact you soon.
footerDescription: Empowering students to achieve excellence in academics, sports, and character. Join us in building the future of education.
newsletterDesc: Subscribe to get the latest news and updates.

teachersCanUpload: Teachers can upload the task file here. Students will be able to open or download it from their dashboard.

teacherTasksSubtitle: These files are visible only to students and the posting teacher.
